description_long: This object is a modern tablet device with a large, rectangular touchscreen dominating the front surface, displaying a colorful user interface with app icons. The screen is surrounded by a slim, black bezel with rounded corners, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The back of the device is matte black with a subtle, centrally placed Apple logo and a dual-lens camera module located in the top-left corner. The edges are thin and slightly rounded, contributing to the device's lightweight and portable design. No physical buttons are visible on the front or sides, suggesting a minimalist approach to hardware controls. The overall construction appears to be a combination of glass and metal, typical of high-end consumer electronics.
description: A sleek, modern tablet with a large touchscreen, slim black bezel, matte black back, and a dual-lens camera in the top-left corner.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large, vibrant touchscreen with app icons and a slim black bezel.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the tablet's thin profile and rounded edges, with the camera bump slightly visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the matte black back, central Apple logo, and dual-lens camera in the top-left corner.
description_view_3: The angled side-front view emphasizes the device's slimness and the expanse of the touchscreen.
attribute_screen_presence: Yes, a large rectangular screen covers almost the entire front surface, with rounded corners and minimal bezel.
attribute_bezel_design: The bezel is slim, black, symmetrical on all sides, and features rounded corners with a smooth finish.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible on the back, centered, medium-sized, and black in color.
attribute_camera_location: A dual-lens camera module is located in the top-left corner on the back of the device.
